title: 3.5 km First run of the year with Jono

sections.markdown:
- Activity: First run of the year with Jono
- Started: 2025-01-16 06:50
- Distance: 3.5 km
- Moving time: 20:47
- Elapsed time: 22:06
- Elevation gain: 54 m
- Average heart rate: 172.3 bpm
- Max heart rate: 199 bpm
- Average speed: 10.1 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `3` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `181.8 bpm`, ranging from `171.5` to `192.0 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `151.3 spm`, with a working range of `138.5` to `160.4 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `158.4 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `144.2 spm` (-14.3 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:56 /km` across `3.503 km` in `20:47` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:48 /km` and second-half pace was `6:04 /km` (+15 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `172.3 bpm` average and `199 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `158.2 bpm` in the first half and `186.8 bpm` in the second (+28.5 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `20:47` out of `22:06` elapsed (94.0%), which shows some stop-start interruption.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `7` stop segments and `1.8%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `62.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `42.2 m` and `70.0 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `28.6 m` in the first half and `33.6 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
